items.title: Millions of WordPress sites just got hacked... again
items.summary:
Warp is the agentic development environment born out of the terminal. Download Warp for free today at → https://go.warp.dev/fireship

Someone spent $100k buying a massive collection of WordPress plugins and planted a backdoor in all of them. Naturally, CloudFlare stepped in with EmDash: a slop-forked WP alternative that promises to fix plugin security for good.

#coding #programming #wordpress

🔖 Topics Covered
- Wordpress plugin hack 
- EmDash

📚 Resources
- https://www.wordfence.com/threat-int

items.title: Claude Mythos is too dangerous for public consumption...
items.summary:
Browserbase is the simplest way to give your agents access to the whole web. Try it for free - https://browserbase.run/fireship

Anthropic locked down their new Mythos model because they say it's too dangerous for normies like you and me to use. Let's investigate...

#mythos #ai #programming #claude 

Resources:
https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/26/c/axios-npm-package-compromised.html

Want more Fireship?

🗞️ Newsletter: https://bytes.dev
🧠 Courses: https://fireship.dev

items.title: Google just casually disrupted the open-source AI narrative…
items.summary:
CodeRabbit CLI can fix your agent’s code before it ever opens a PR - https://coderabbit.link/fireship Free forever for any open source project.

Last week, Google surprised us all by shipping their latest micro model Gemma 4 under a truly open source license. But what's the catch? Let's run it...

#coding  #programming #programming

🔖 Topics Covered
-  How Gemma 4 works
-  Gemma 4 benchmarks
- TurboQuant

📌 Resources
- https://newsletter.maartengrootendorst.com/p/a-visual-guide-to-gemma-4

Want

items.title: How Gen Z feels about AI #Vergecast
items.summary:
Survey data shows a growing disconnect around AI: Only 22% of Gen Z say they feel excited about it, while 42% report anxiety and 31% feel anger.
